title: Sibba 6Pcs Rubber Jar Gripper Pads, Multi-purpose Jar Opener Grippers, Bottle Lid Openers Round Kitchen Coasters for Elderly Children Women Weak Hands
description:
About this item
Open Jar Lids with Ease: Enjoy the convenience and efficiency of our 6-piece jar opener gripper pads. Perfect for opening tight jar lids, bottle caps, and sealed containers, this kitchen tool is an essential for seniors and those with weak hands.
Premium Quality: Our jar gripper pads are made of high quality rubber, soft, flexible, durable and odorless. They are also heat resistant, wear resistant, and easy to clean. With their bright colors, they can add a pop of color to your kitchen decor.
A Great Helper: The surface of our jar gripper pads have textured patterns that provide greater friction to loosen stubborn jar lids. The rubber pads have a strong grip to make it easy for women, elderly, children, and those with weak hands to open jar lids.
User-Friendly Design: Our rubber jar gripper pads are easy to use. Simply place the bottle opener on the jar lid, and twist it open as usual. And with a diameter of 4.92 inches, these round jar grippers are easy to handle.
Multi-functional Use: In addition to serving as jar and bottle openers, our rubber pads can also be used as coasters, insulation pads, and dining mats. With 6 different colors to choose from, you can use them in your kitchen, dining room, or other parts of your home.
reviews_5s: Great for opening jars and bottles. I even carry one in my purse to open water or soda bottles. And it takes up so little space.These gripper pads are so useful and I use them every day! The colors are pretty and I keep them out on my kitchen cabinet for easy reach.Great to help open jars or anything with a tight lidperfect gift for someone who moving to their first apartment or house for the first time! also great shower gift!Great quality really works on slippery surfaces!I bought these to go under glass cat food bowl, so they would not slide around on the tile and they work wonderfullyI have trouble opening jars and these work extremely well so far so good I would buy them again. I use them at four potholders as well.Perfect for opening jars.My wife loves them and uses them all the timeI always lose those thin rubber pads that are great for opening jars and bottles of all size. So I looked for them online and found these. They are exactly like the thins ones you probably have hidden somewhere in your house. So far they are perfect.
reviews_1s: These may be useful for other purposes, but I wanted something to help open tough jar lids that are hurting my wrists and they were useless. Maybe the jar I am trying to open is just a bad jar with a lid that won't come off, but that's the one I needed the help with, I've opened other jars myself.
